mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 1.0% signals monetary accommodation that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:current FEDFUNDS at 0.09% indicates deep accommodation regime
regime_hint: monetary easing cycle with rates near zero
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS < 1.0%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in nonfarm payroll employment above 150,000 persons signals robust labor market expansion that sustains consumer spending and corporate profit growth, driving positive equity returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Payroll growth fails to predict positive 5-day returns with Rank IC > 0.05, or SPX declines in more than 50% of months with PAYEMS growth > 150k.

mechanism_narrative: A joint contraction in retail sales and housing starts signals weakening aggregate demand and consumer confidence, which compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 2% month-over-month AND HOUST declines > 5% month-over-month
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 617,719 million, HOUST at 1,534 thousand units
regime_hint: late-cycle contraction or post-shock demand collapse
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction term (RSAFS × HOUST) shows Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index declining below 101.0 signals supply-side weakness and reduced manufacturing capacity utilization, which constrains corporate earnings growth and produces negative equity returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 55% of instances when INDPRO < 101.0, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate rising above 5.5% signals labor market deterioration and reduced consumer purchasing power, which dampens corporate revenue growth and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or recession onset
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of instances when UNRATE > 5.5%, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint condition of rising inflation (CPIAUCSL growth > 3% annualized) and elevated federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS > 3.0%) signals monetary tightening that increases discount rates and reduces equity valuations, producing negative forward returns over 20 trading days.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with inflation concerns
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction term (FEDFUNDS × CPIAUCSL) shows Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) expanding above 2.5% annualized signals robust economic expansion that supports corporate earnings and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:current GDPC1 at 19,360.6 billion chained 2017 dollars
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in more than 50% of instances with GDPC1 growth > 2.5% annualized, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth combined with declining unemployment signals simultaneous supply expansion and labor market tightness, which increases corporate pricing power and profit margins, producing positive equity returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO month-over-month growth > 0.5% AND UNRATE declines > 0.2pp month-over-month
regime_hint: tight labor market with supply-side expansion
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the interaction term (INDPRO × UNRATE) shows Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.
